# REQ-CR-260007: MVP Frontend Architecture Boundary Constraints

- Class: CR
- Status: Accepted
- Date: 2026-04-17
- Source decision: G1, G4 (Architectural style and modularity rule)

## Requirement

MVP delivery shall not use micro-frontend decomposition or unrestricted cross-feature internal imports; architectural boundaries must remain feature-sliced with explicit public interfaces and centralized api-contract bindings.

## Rationale

Constraining architectural complexity in MVP preserves delivery speed and enforces maintainable dependency structure.

## Scope Notes

- In scope for MVP constraint: feature-sliced boundaries, import/dependency controls, centralized backend-contract boundary.
- Out of scope for this requirement: post-MVP architectural decomposition experiments.

## Verification

- Architecture checks confirm no micro-frontend deployment split is introduced in MVP.
- Dependency checks confirm forbidden cross-feature internal imports are absent.
- Scope checks confirm API contract usage is centralized through the api-contract boundary.

## Traceability

- Related ADRs: ADR-260018
- Related backlog items: BI-260015
